response.justification: Despite a strong overall software engineering background, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains — the core requirement. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and NI LabWindows, with no evidence of production-grade financial systems development, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or domain knowledge in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong dev-ops and CI/CD practices demonstrated across roles
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows in financial systems
Missing explicit SQL Server or Oracle experience in capital markets context
No evidence of fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain exposure
